title: Slovakian Noodle Dish
description: A kid-friendly Slovakian dish featuring yeasty and silky noodles, this recipe is kosher-friendly and uses shio-cure for added flavor.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the egg noodles according to package instructions.
In a small bowl, mix the shio cure and yeast together.
In a large saucepan, combine the chicken broth, sour cream, and shio cure mixture, and stir over low heat until the mixture is smooth.
Add the cooked noodles to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add the butter, salt, and pepper to the saucepan and stir until the butter is melted.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the mixture for 5 minutes.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or dill if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
